basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website Allahabad University Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India/ICMR rules.

qualification.details: Project Technical Support-III: Three years graduate degree in Zoology/Agricultural Entomology/Allied subjects + Three years post qualification (work) experience OR M.Sc. Zoology/ Agricultural Entomology/Allied subjects. Desirable: Excellent academic record with first class in graduate and postgraduate examinations. Candidates with hands-on training, experience and knowledge in insect rearing and hemolymph collection, protein isolation and purification, biochemical and enzymatic assays, SDS-PAGE and related protein characterization techniques, molecular biology techniques such as RNA isolation, cDNA synthesis, PCR, gene cloning, recombinant protein expression, microbial culture techniques and in vitro and in vivo experimental studies, will be preferred. Additional preference will be given to candidates qualified GATE /NET (Life Sciences).

salary_details.details: Rs. 28000/- per month + HRA 20% for the first two years. An increment of 5% on the initial emoluments after completing two years, subject to satisfactory performance review.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
